input.description: Check what the fix commit touched

data.output:
commit 5ae2fb8c774ab27e5a37b2131104d19f18b5c315
Author: Test User <test@ddx.test>
Date:   Wed Apr 22 22:07:26 2026 -0400

    fix(docgraph): exclude .claude/worktrees and store relative document paths [ddx-12cae4dd]
    
    The web UI documents view surfaced throwaway agent worktree copies under
    .claude/worktrees/ and stored every document path as an absolute filesystem
    path. The resulting URLs contained a leading double slash and 404'd:
    
      /nodes/x/projects/y/documents//Users/erik/.../docs/resources/agent-harness-ac.md
    
    Changes
    - findMarkdownFiles skips .claude and any worktrees/ directory in addition to
      .git and .ddx. These are tool-managed scratch areas, not canonical docs.
    - doc.Path and PathToID keys are now relative to the docgraph root. Callers
      that touch the filesystem or shell out to git resolve against RootDir at
      the boundary (Stamp, handleDocWrite, mcpDocWrite, doc history/diff).
    - DocumentByPath resolver prefers the docgraph-tracked location (under
      workingDir) before falling back to the configured library path, so
      clicking a document surfaced by the list actually renders instead of
      showing "Document not found". Absolute-form paths are rejected.
    
    Tests
    - docgraph: TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths
      pins both defects (AC #1, #2, #6).
    - server: TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths and
      TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc cover the GraphQL
      surface (AC #3, #4, #5).
    - playwright: documents.spec.ts adds "ddx-12cae4dd" asserting the list
      never exposes .claude/ or absolute paths and a docs/ entry renders (AC #7).
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/documents.spec.ts |  84 +++++++++++++
 cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_documents.go  |  48 +++++---

 cli/internal/server/server.go                      |  12 +-

data.text:
All fixes are already present on this branch via commit `5ae2fb8c`. The previous review BLOCK referenced a stale state where only execution bookkeeping had been merged; since then the actual fix commits have been re-merged. All AC items are satisfied:

- AC1,2,6: `cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go` (findMarkdownFiles skips `.claude`/`worktrees`, paths relative via `relPath`) + passing test `TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths`
- AC3,4,5: GraphQL resolvers updated + passing tests `TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths`, `TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc`
- AC7: `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/documents.spec.ts` (ddx-12cae4dd)

No changes to commit.

input.content:
Bead ddx-12cae4dd was already satisfied on this branch by commit 5ae2fb8c
("fix(docgraph): exclude .claude/worktrees and store relative document paths
[ddx-12cae4dd]"), which is present in the branch history at execution time.

The prior REVIEW:BLOCK note was based on an earlier merge snapshot (4671d2db)
where only execution bookkeeping had landed. Between that review and this
attempt, the functional commits from 5ae2fb8c were merged back onto the base
branch, so every AC item now has concrete evidence:

- AC1, AC2, AC6: cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go — findMarkdownFiles
  switches on dir name and SkipDirs ".git", ".ddx", ".claude", "worktrees"
  at any depth; doc.Path and PathToID keys are built with relPath(cleanRoot,
  filePath) so they are relative to workingDir. Test
  TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths in
  cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph_test.go exercises the exact fixture from
  AC6 (.claude/worktrees/agent-x/docs/foo.md vs docs/foo.md) and passes.

- AC3, AC4, AC5: cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_documents.go +
  cli/cmd/doc.go updates ensure the GraphQL documents query returns only
  docgraph-tracked (relative) paths, and document(id:) resolves both
  previously-absolute and new-relative forms. Tests
  TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths and
  TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc in
  cli/internal/server/graphql_documents_test.go pass.

- AC7: cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/documents.spec.ts contains the
  "ddx-12cae4dd" Playwright case asserting no listed document has a path
  containing .claude/ or starting with /, and that a real docs/ entry
  renders.

Verified locally:
  go test -run TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths
    ./internal/docgraph/  — PASS
  go test -run 'TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths|TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc'
    ./internal/server/   — PASS

No further code changes are required; committing would duplicate 5ae2fb8c.

data.text: Bead ddx-12cae4dd is already satisfied on this branch by commit `5ae2fb8c`. All three test groups (docgraph unit, GraphQL, Playwright spec) are in place and the Go tests pass. Wrote `no_changes_rationale.txt` explaining that the prior REVIEW:BLOCK referenced a stale merge state and the fix commits are now present.
